org.apache.juneau.rest.client.HttpTransport

Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.

    JavaHttpTransport
    HttpTransport implementation backed by the JDK's built-in HttpClient.

    Method
    Description
    HttpTransport

    Builds and returns a configured HttpTransport instance.

    Creates and returns a new HttpTransport instance using default configuration.
